content.en:
Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian gradually had a new understanding of the Extreme Dao of Water, and he had a different perception and understanding from the other direction.

Of course, Ye Tian didn't comprehend for a long time, and after about an eternal period of enlightenment, he had a lot of insights.

this day.

Ye Tian notified the Yueli controller to come over.

Soon, the Moonglass Controller came

"Ye Tian, have you started to teach me officially now?"

The Moonglass Controller asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded, "Yueli, the way I teach is very special, you just need to follow my teaching method to comprehend and practice, as long as you follow my guidance, you should make rapid progress." "

The moon glass controller was stunned, Ye Tian was so confident!

At this time, she was full of curiosity and expectation for Ye Tian's guidance.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to show the master of the moon glass the mystery and fusion method of the prototype of the Water Pole Dao, the fusion of various changes in the prototype of the Water Pole Dao, showing the many changes of the Water Pole Dao.

"Yueli, just follow this method to integrate and practice enlightenment!"

Ye Tian said.

"That's it?"

The moon glass controller was stunned.

There is nothing special about this kind of teaching, this is no different from the Water Extreme Dao among the perfect treasures such as Shenwu Chao!

However, Ye Tian taught her so, she at least had to try, if it didn't work, let's talk to Ye Tian again.

Thereupon.

The master of the moon glass practiced the power of the Extreme Dao of Enlightenment Water in the manner of Ye Tian.

The years have passed, and a short period of time has passed in a blink of an eye.

"It's really improved!!"

The Moonglass Controller was shocked.

Previously, her Water Extreme Dao rudimentary changes had been fused to more than 800 kinds left, but now there were only more than 700 kinds left.

You must know that when the prototype of the Extreme Dao is in the back, it is extremely difficult to fuse one more, but now, in a short period of time, she has fused more than 100 kinds of changes, reducing the changes of the prototype of the Extreme Dao of Water to more than 700 kinds, what a speed!

"This kind of cultivation is even better than the effect in the Space-Time Ancestral Realm!"

The moon glass controller said secretly.

The Time and Space Ancestral Realm, in addition to the Extreme Dao Mountain, the effect of enlightenment in many places is also good, after leaving the Time and Space Ancestral Realm, under the guidance of Ye Tian, the progress is faster.

At this moment, she was completely convinced.

In terms of comprehending the Extreme Dao, she felt that the Lord of the Old Ancestor Canggu was not as good as Ye Tian!

After all, if the Lord of the Ancient Ages had such a teaching ability, he would have cultivated more geniuses from the Daoless Pagoda who had comprehended the Extreme Dao Creation Realm and the half-step Perfect Controller Realm!

Moreover, among the descendants of the Lord of the Ancients, there are also strong people who have comprehended the Extreme Dao of Time and Space, and they have also been guided by the Lord of the Ancients, but I have never heard of anyone making such rapid progress!

After following Ye Tian to practice for a period of time, the master of the moon glass was full of confidence in comprehending the extreme path of water.

If she condenses the body of the Extreme Dao with the Extreme Dao of Water, she will be able to break more chains of Extreme Realm, and in the future, she has the hope of becoming a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm like the Ancestor, even if the combat power is not as good as the Ancestor, but it is also the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm!

If you can't comprehend the Extreme Dao and condense the body of the Extreme Realm among the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm, it will be impossible to step into the realm of the Extreme Perfect Controllers in the future.

"Yueli, you will always practice like this from now on!"

Ye Tian advised.

"Yes, Teacher Ye Tian!" Yueli said.

......

After Yueli made steady progress, Ye Tian could be regarded as relieved, at least he would not live up to the entrustment of the Lord of Canggu.

And he can also rest assured that he can refine the liquid of Qingling.

Immediately, Ye Tian took out a drop of the green zero liquid, and then wrapped the green zero liquid with his will, slowly refining the green zero liquid.

Rumble!!!

The energy of the cyan liquid exploded, constantly nourishing Ye Tian's will.

Originally, Ye Tian's will had almost reached the peak of the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, but at this moment, his will actually began to show signs of transformation.

This is not to increase the quantity of the half-step perfect will of the Extreme Creation Realm, but to improve the quality!

The quantity is easy to improve, but the quality is too difficult to improve.

Moreover, the gap between the half-step perfect will and the extreme will is too big, and it is too difficult to improve it.

Therefore, even if Ye Tian completely refined these Blue Zero liquids, he would not be able to completely ascend to the Extreme Dao Will, at most he would only touch the surface of the Extreme Dao Will.

Time passed slowly, and drop after drop of green zero liquid was absorbed and refined by Ye Tian's will, and the quality of the will became higher and higher, correspondingly, the will was also getting stronger and stronger.

After a long time, all the cyan liquid was exhausted.

"It's a pity, there is no such Liquid of Green Zero, and there is no such extreme treasure on the Lord of Canggu, I have to rely on myself to find it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And it's too difficult to find such an extreme treasure!

But if there was no such Extreme Dao treasure, all Ye Tian could do at present was to continue to comprehend more Extreme Dao, or improve the realm of the Extreme Dao.

Of course, after refining the Liquid of the Blue Zero this time, Ye Tian could continue to practice and comprehend the Endless Extreme Dao Prototype, so that the changes in the Endless Extreme Dao Prototype could continue to merge a little.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of eternal years have passed.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian's Endless Extreme Dao rudimentary changes fused to twenty-nine kinds, but at this time, he fell into shackles again, and there was no way to continue to fuse and improve.

"I have to find another Extreme Treasure!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

"I don't know if there is an Extreme Dao treasure similar to the Liquid of the Blue Zero in the Extreme Dao Source Sea!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He felt that he should spend some more time in the Extreme Dao Source Sea, maybe he could really find similar Extreme Dao treasures.

As a result, Ye Tian condensed the Void Sparrow to copy the body, allowing the Void Sparrow to continue to go deep into the Extreme Dao Source Sea, spending a lot of time looking for it.

With his current strength, he can also condense the Void Sparrow, and with the body of the Void Sparrow, it is enough to exert a combat power close to the body.

Even if you encounter a super-perfect master, there is hope to escape.

And.

In the depths of the Extreme Dao Source Sea, a super-perfect controller would hardly set foot there, and he would be very safe.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian entered the Extreme Dao Source Sea and condensed the Void Sparrow Replica Body.

"I hope I can find the Extreme Treasure that suits me this time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Airplanes!

The Void Sparrow copied its body to tear through time and space, and quickly escaped into the depths of the Extreme Dao Source Sea.

And Ye Tian waited slowly like this, expecting the Void Sparrow to replicate the harvest of his body.
